a:r.a:t: Sales | Key roles and incentive drivers
Conduct tour presentations for first-time buyers
Close new buyer contracts and generate revenue
New buyer growth vs margin preservation tradeoffs
Cost per Tour pressure vs frontline revenue incentives
Product strategy not consistently reflected in incentives
Short-term performance spikes vs sustained results
Quarterly profitability alignment vs monthly earnings cadence
Drive upgrades and incremental purchases from existing owners
Maximize contract value within owner base
Mixed responsibilities of both Action Line and In-House Sales Executives
Close large or strategically important deals
Monthly bonus (based on % to target - 8 levels)
Step in when deals stall or pricing flexibility is required
Provide exception authority to protect margin and secure close
Responsible for closing production, inventory tracking, SPIFF processing, contract validation, floor coverage, and mentoring Sales Team Members.
Oversee net sales and contribution performance
Align sales execution with profitability targets
Converting tours into revenue and margin
